name: Financial Integrity
rules: All monetary amounts in cents (integers, never floats)
Ledger is append-only — never UPDATE or DELETE ledger_entries
Balances are computed from ledger entries via event_financial_summary view
Never write directly to a balance column
If a number looks wrong, fix the ledger entry — never patch a balance
Never circumvent immutability triggers on ledger_entries, event_transitions, or quote_state_transitions
